projects.title: 01  /  API Employee Directory
projects.content: An employee directory that integrates with a third-party API (Application Programming Interface). This project involves making HTTP requests to the API to retrieve employee data and presenting it on a web page.

projects.title: 02  /  Interactive Photo Gallery
projects.content: A responsive photo gallery that combines structured front-end layout with interactive browsing features. Built with HTML, CSS Grid, and JavaScript, the project uses live search filtering and lightbox functionality to create a more seamless, user-friendly way to explore image content.

projects.title: 03  /  Game Show Application
projects.content: This project showcases a dynamic phrase guessing game that uses JavaScript to manage game state, user interaction, and win-loss logic. Random phrase generation, interactive keyboard input, letter matching, and scoreboard tracking work together to create a responsive and engaging gameplay experience within the browser.

projects.title: 04  /  Tic Tac Toe Game
projects.content: A Tic-Tac-Toe game built with React, focusing on component-based design, state-driven rendering, and user interaction. Game logic, move tracking, and real-time interface updates work together to demonstrate the fundamentals of building interactive applications with React.

projects.title: 05  /  Bootstrap Site
projects.content: A front-end styling project that applies Sass to create a more modular and maintainable CSS architecture. Variables, mixins, partials, and component-based organization work together to improve consistency, simplify updates, and support a more efficient responsive design workflow.
